zh.Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England: 英國戴文貝里 波梅洛易
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Pomeroy於大約1446年出生在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易時，她的父親Sir Henry de la Pomeroy31歲，母親Alice Raleigh34歲。她於1465年與Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1496年在英國戴文波德哈姆 卡素享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Pomeroy于大约1446年出生在英国英格兰戴文貝里 波梅洛易时，她的父亲Sir Henry de la Pomeroy31岁，母亲Alice Raleigh34岁。她于1465年与Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley在英国英格兰戴文貝里 波梅洛易结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1496年在英国戴文波德哈姆 卡素享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pomeroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin; mainly Devon and Dorset): habitational name from any of various places in northeastern France named with Old French pommeroie, pommeraie ‘apple orchard’ (collective of pomme ‘apple’). The name was established in Ireland in 1573.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Pomeroy was born about 1446, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Henry de la Pomeroy, was 31 and her mother, Alice Raleigh, was 34. She married Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley in 1465, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1496, in Powderham Castle, Devon, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Pomeroy est née environ 1446, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry de la Pomeroy, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Raleigh, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley en 1465, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1496, à Powderham Castle, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.Berry Pomeroy, Devonshire, England, UK: Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Pomeroy um 1446 in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry de la Pomeroy 31 und ihre Mutter Alice Raleigh 34. Sie hat 1465 in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1496 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Powderham Castle, Devon, England.

Lei sposato Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley nel 1465, nel Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1496, nel Powderham Castle, Devon, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pomeroyが約1446年にイギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de la Pomeroyは31歳，母Alice Raleighは34歳であった。1465年にイギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイでHumphrey Courtenay of Bickleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1496年にイギリスデボンポウデルハム カストルで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pomeroy(이)가 대략 1446년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry de la Pomeroy(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Raleigh(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1496년 영국 데폰 파우더함 카스틀에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Pomeroy nasceu aproximadamente 1446, em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry de la Pomeroy, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Raleigh, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley em 1465, em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1496, em Powderham Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ro.Berry Pomeroy, Devonshire, England, UK: Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Pomeroy родилась около 1446 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Henry de la Pomeroy было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Raleigh, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley в 1465 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1496 г. в местности поудирам кастл, девон, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Pomeroy nació aproximadamente 1446, en Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Henry de la Pomeroy, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice Raleigh, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Humphrey Courtenay of Bickley en 1465, en Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1496, en Powderham Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
